message: The other day, I found myself sitting on the porch with my dog, Benny, watching him chase after a stick. It hit me—sometimes the best fun doesn’t come from a store but from the simple things. We had a whole afternoon of low-tech joy, just him and that stick. It reminded me how important it is to have a plan for our furry friends, especially when it comes to keeping them safe during emergencies. A little refresher on pet preparedness can go a long way! Have you ever had one of those simple, joyful moments with your pets?
